allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "PROFILE path: $PROFILE"; Write-Output "Exists: $\(Test-Path $PROFILE\)"; Write-Output "PSVersion: $\($PSVersionTable.PSVersion\)"; Write-Output "pwsh installed: $\([bool]\(Get-Command pwsh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\)")
PowerShell($dir = Split-Path $PROFILE; if \(-not \(Test-Path $dir\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dir | Out-Null; Write-Output "Created $dir" } else { Write-Output "Dir exists: $dir" })

PowerShell(powershell -NoLogo -Command ". `$PROFILE; Write-Output '--- cl visible:'; \(Get-Command cl.exe\).Source; Write-Output '--- compiling:'; nvcc matmul.cu -o matmul.exe; if \(`$?\) { .\\matmul.exe }")
PowerShell(powershell -NoLogo -Command ". `$PROFILE; Write-Output '=== startup done ==='; nvcc matmul.cu -o matmul.exe; if \(`$?\) { .\\matmul.exe }")
